programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: On the final night, Giovanni flies the flag for Sicily with some family recipes. But he has a tagliatelle tragedy.

programs.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programs.desc: Christy and Matt pour £1m into a seven-bed house in serious need of TLC. Heather and Dave take on converted stables that they bought when they were on holiday.

programs.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programs.desc: There's one last hoorah in the Sunday school hall before it becomes the pottery studio, as Keith and Marj turn it into a party venue and bring singing back to the chapel.

programs.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programs.desc: First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News (bingo and Oasis).

programs.title: Gogglebox
programs.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Virgin Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, The Neighbourhood, Made in Chelsea and How to Clean-Up for Cash.

programs.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programs.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can he pull a dysfunctional diner back from the brink of bankruptcy.
